$schema-comment: Phase 1 dev gate sample. 20 property-must-hold obligations, stratified into 3 strata (A=token-content, B=filesystem-shape, C=compound). Each predicate exits 0 (property holds) against the v8.0.1 (a7e5455) snapshot — chosen because that SHA pre-dates evidence/phase1-dev-gate, so the gate workspace is not re-entrant against its own committed evidence. The codex falsifier may only ADD files (per src/falsification/adapters/codex/codex-prompt.ts), so every predicate is of the negation form: exit 0 means no offending content/path exists. List locked under DECISIONS.md 2026-05-09 entry; do not modify in place — supersede with a new dated sample if the gate has to be redone.
fixtureSnapshot: git archive a7e5455 (v8.0.1 tag) — pinned in scripts/phase1-dev-gate/run-gate.ts to keep the workspace evidence-free

strata.A: token-content absence (grep-based) — falsified by adding a file containing the forbidden token
strata.B: filesystem-shape absence (find-based) — falsified by adding a file matching a forbidden path/shape
strata.C: compound absence (find + grep / size + path) — falsified by adding a file that satisfies multiple offending conditions at once

obligations.target: no eval() in src/falsification
no XXX_FORBIDDEN_TOKEN_PHASE1_GATE marker anywhere in repo
no PEM RSA private-key header in repo
no console.log( in src/falsification
no literal password = ' assignment in src
no // SECURITY: TODO comment in src
no Bearer-token literal in src
no aws_secret_access_key token in repo
no .env file at repo root
no *.key files in repo (excluding node_modules and .git)
no service-account*.json files in repo
no symlinks under src/
no *.pem at repo root
no source file > 200 KB under src/
no SSH private-key files (id_rsa/id_dsa/id_ed25519) in repo
no .ts file under src/falsification over 30 KB
no JSON file at repo root containing 'TODO'
no <script> tag in templates/
no *.test.ts file under test/falsification over 50 KB
no Markdown file at repo root containing 'REDACTED'
